app.name: channelist
app.tagline: Export your YouTube subscriptions as Text/CSV/Markdown/JSON/OPML and share them as an image

landing.step1Body: In YouTube privacy settings, turn <0>off</0> "Keep all my subscriptions private".
landing.step1AppDetail: Bottom-right "You" tab → gear icon (Settings) top-right → Privacy → turn off "Keep all my subscriptions private" (in case the link opens the app instead of the settings page).
landing.step2Title: Enter your handle or URL and fetch
landing.step2Body: Enter your handle (a name starting with @) or channel URL below and fetch.
landing.step3Body: Once fetched, don't forget to turn the setting <0>back to private</0>.
landing.warning: While it is off, anyone can view your subscription list.
landing.noStore: Your data is never stored on the server.

result.reminder: Have you set your subscriptions back to private?

share.title: Share as image
share.tweetText: My YouTube subscriptions 📺 Show me yours! #channelist
share.xSavedHint: Image saved — attach it in the X composer that just opened.

error.HANDLE_NOT_FOUND: Channel not found. Please check the handle.
error.SUBSCRIPTIONS_PRIVATE: Your subscriptions are private. Turn off the setting in step 1, wait a few minutes, and try again.
error.QUOTA_EXCEEDED: The daily usage limit has been reached. It resets at midnight Pacific Time.
error.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

footer.buyMeACoffee: Support me on Buy Me a Coffee
